title: Parabilis sets a record with a $670M biotech IPO
summary: The largest-ever new stock sale for a venture-backed biotech company extends a streak of large IPOs in 2026 that’s now resulted in 12 drug startups securing more than $4.1 billion combined.

title: J&J to acquire Firefly, maker of ‘degrader’ antibody drugs, for $1B
